freshness_registry_audit.notes: All three records (ids 8-10) inserted via commit 2e77202 during P37 CI to satisfy the 14-day freshness cadence gate. BIG_LOTTO (id=8) and POWER_LOTTO (id=9) had stale runs from 2026-05-07 (16 days). DAILY_539 (id=10) documents the Wave 2 production apply. None introduce false data — they document real operational state. The freshness guard cadence (14-day limit) is a design choice that requires periodic maintenance registrations when large apply tasks span multiple phases. This is expected behavior, not a drift.
